formName: Step 3 - Technical Information (Joint Works & Crown Land)
formDescription: This section determines if works are shared with other parties, involves a Water Users’ Community, or requires permission to occupy/flood Crown Land (Permit Over Crown Land - PCL).

WSLICAreThereJointWorks.title: Are any of your works joint with another person's or group's works?
WSLICAreThereJointWorks.description: Indicates if the works are connected to or shared with another person or group. A Joint Works Agreement is recommended if 'Yes'.

GWNAWaterSuppliedByUsersCommun.title: Will the water be supplied by a Water Users' Community?
GWNAWaterSuppliedByUsersCommun.description: A Water Users’ Community is a group of 6 or more licensees incorporated under the Water Users' Communities Act.

GWNANameOfWaterUsersCommunity.title: Name of Water Users' Community:
GWNANameOfWaterUsersCommunity.description: Select the specific incorporated Water Users' Community from the provincial list.

V1PCLStatement1.title: Do any of the Crown Land occupation criteria apply?
V1PCLStatement1.description: Criteria include: works located on/crossing Crown land, well located on Crown land, or proposed flooding of Crown land.

V1PCLStatement2.title: Do any Land Act tenure criteria apply?
V1PCLStatement2.description: Criteria include: Power purposes, major works (conveyance > 0.01 m3/s), dams > 9m, storage > 1,000,000 m3, or permanent roads/transmission lines.

V1PCLExistingCrownLandTenure.title: Do you have an existing Crown Land Tenure, Permit over Crown Land or Mines Lease that covers the affected Crown Land?
V1PCLExistingCrownLandTenure.description: Check if there is already an existing authorization covering the area in question.

V1PCLFloodingCrownLand.title: Are you flooding Crown land?
V1PCLFloodingCrownLand.description: Indicates if the operation will cause Crown land to be submerged.

V1PCLWorksCrossCrownLand.title: Are any of the works, excluding the well(s), on Crown land?
V1PCLWorksCrossCrownLand.description: Specifies if infrastructure like pipes or roads (excluding the well head) occupy Crown land.

V1PCLLengthOfWorksOnCrownLand.title: Total length of works on Crown land:

V1PCLWidthOfWorksOnCrownLand5m.title: Width of works on Crown land (minimum 5.0m):
V1PCLWidthOfWorksOnCrownLand5m.description: The width of the area used by the works on Crown land.

V1PCLNewIntakePipe.title: Are you proposing a new intake pipe?
V1PCLNewIntakePipe.description: Indicates if a new pipe will be installed into the water source.

V1PCLLengthOfIntakePipe.title: Length of pipe from high water mark into water source:
V1PCLLengthOfIntakePipe.description: Required if the pipe extends more than 15 metres from the high water mark.
